description_long: This lamp features a minimalist, modern design with a slender, black vertical pole rising from a square, dark green base. At the top of the pole sits a large, spherical, frosted green lamp head, which likely diffuses light evenly in all directions. The base appears flat and sturdy, providing stability for the tall, narrow structure. The lamp's clean lines and lack of ornamentation suggest it is intended for functional, contemporary urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the pole and base, with a frosted glass or plastic globe for the lamp head. The overall aesthetic is sleek and utilitarian, with a focus on simplicity and durability.
description: A tall, minimalist floor lamp with a black pole, square dark green base, and a large frosted green spherical lamp head. Its design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the lamp, the round green lamp head, and the square base directly beneath.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same vertical pole and spherical lamp head, with the base appearing as a flat square.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, emphasizing the symmetry of the pole and lamp head above the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slender pole and round lamp head, with the square base visible below.
